---
title: "An example manuscript"
---

## Introduction

Earlier work suggested a link between vaccination and developmental disorders
(doi:10.1016/S0140-6736(97)11096-0), a claim that has since been discredited.
For structural context see https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-020-2649-2.

## Methods

We followed standard procedures. A further reference is 10.1126/science.aac4716.
